name: Arduino_10BASE_T1S
description: Generic library for providing IP based 10BASE-T1S communication.
note: The bundled liblwip sources are excluded here because on RP2040 (arduino-pico) the core already supplies a compatible lwIP 2.x stack. The library source files use #ifdef ARDUINO_ARCH_RP2040 to switch between the core-supplied headers (<lwip/...>) and the bundled headers. For non-RP2040 targets (e.g. Arduino UNO R4 / Renesas) a separate environment that re-adds the liblwip sources is needed.
